text_block_list.text:
Victorious am I! Just as all expected,<n>today's
Derby was one for the ages!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
And yet my worthy adversary, whose<n>intensity
surpasses the Golden<n>Generation's, declines me!
It seems<n>that to run by my side is an honor too
high.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, the winds of time billow<n>my sails!
Even without a worthy foe,<n>the crowds roar for
me. They yearn<n>for the bell to toll and mark the
passing of an era!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
So ring it I shall. The Golden<n>Generation awaits at
the Arima Kinen!
